API Collection# RandomAccessCollection Implementations

## [Topics](/documentation/TabularData/DataFrame/Row/RandomAccessCollection-Implementations#topics)

### [Instance Properties](/documentation/TabularData/DataFrame/Row/RandomAccessCollection-Implementations#Instance-Properties)

[`var endIndex: Int`](/documentation/tabulardata/dataframe/row/endindex)The index of the final column in the row.[`var startIndex: Int`](/documentation/tabulardata/dataframe/row/startindex)The index of the initial column in the row.### [Instance Methods](/documentation/TabularData/DataFrame/Row/RandomAccessCollection-Implementations#Instance-Methods)

[`func index(after: Int) -> Int`](/documentation/tabulardata/dataframe/row/index(after:))Returns the column index immediately before a column index in the row.[`func index(before: Int) -> Int`](/documentation/tabulardata/dataframe/row/index(before:))Returns the column index immediately after a column index in the row.### [Subscripts](/documentation/TabularData/DataFrame/Row/RandomAccessCollection-Implementations#Subscripts)

[`subscript(Int) -> Any?`](/documentation/tabulardata/dataframe/row/subscript(_:)-5tsj0)Accesses a value at a column index.[`subscript(Range<Int>) -> Slice<DataFrame.Row>`](/documentation/tabulardata/dataframe/row/subscript(_:)-9bmjj)Accesses a slice from a range of indices.
